comment:
Centella brightning ampoule DOES brighten your skin, but you have to use it for like 3-4 months to see proper results. However its more focused on mild pigmentation + hydration. It evens your skin, hydrates enough and doesnt break out. (I live in tropical country & have oily skin) it worked for me for everyday use. Twice a day. I paired it with Centella poremizing gel moisturizer cos its better for my oily skin. The combo was so good for oily production control and skin texture.

However after using for 6+ months I feel like quitting Brightning ampoule & try Anua serum as I still have a bit of lightly visible acne dark spots & hyperpigmentation.

comment:
I have been using skin1004 for 2 months now.. Almost.. Only at night..of course i give break after few days for one night  si tgat my skin doesnt actually get used to it and the product to work better. 
So how i got benefited. - 
I had oily skin,  it got controlled. Like i have normal skin now. Even at 35-36 degree outside, i dont get oily. 
My acne problem has been significantly reduced. Before using this i had been sufdering from acne due to stress or hormonal related. But since i have started using this, there has been acne..but very lesser in number and even if some showed up, the dark spot recovered real quick . Those acne also lasted few days.  
Okay so heres the meh part for me. 
It didnt help with dark circle (cz of course cz its not strong enough). And the old acne spots.. They r fading slowly. Not too much. But working gently. Heres another thing why its happening cz i dont use sunscreen 😢. I know i know a sunscreen is a must. Also i dont use any other skin care product. 
So if im not using anyother skin care product can have at least that much benefits.. It might work wonder for u girls
